injury_notes: Ismael Kone serious leg injury after Madibo challenge

forecast_audit.scoreline: major miss; Canada blowout tail severely underweighted
forecast_audit.script: Canada pressure script hit; Qatar low-block resilience and discipline were overestimated

matches.postmortem_file: 比赛/已完成比赛/小组赛/B组/2026-06-18_瑞士_4-1_波黑_复盘.md

goal_notes: Mahmic scored for Bosnia and Herzegovina

forecast_audit.wdl: missed draw lean; Switzerland win probability too low
forecast_audit.scoreline: major miss; late Swiss scoring burst not captured
forecast_audit.script: Swiss control existed; substitution impact and Bosnia red-card collapse were underweighted

main_lessons: First-round group-wide draws should not mechanically raise second-round draw baseline too far.
Red cards can turn narrow favorite scripts into blowout tails; discipline risk needs stronger interaction terms.
Canada's home attacking ceiling was underestimated.
Switzerland's late substitute impact and conversion ceiling were underestimated.
Qatar and Bosnia and Herzegovina both showed collapse risk once their defensive plan was disrupted.
handoff_to_round3: Canada vs Switzerland should model two high-confidence teams but include Kone injury and market overreaction risk.
Qatar and Bosnia final-round profiles need severe discipline and goal-difference pressure adjustments.
B group draw baseline must be reset downward after round-two blowouts.
